name: Smokey Tomato and Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Lentils, rinsed and sorted, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium-low heat. Add onions and garlic, and sauté until transparent and lightly browned.
2. Add chicken stock, ham hock, celery, carrots, and lentils to the pot. Stir in all seasonings.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 45 minutes.
4. Skim off any foam or fat from the surface of the soup.
5. Remove the ham hock, discard the bone, skin, and any visible fat.
6. Return the cooked ham to the soup.
7. Add canned tomatoes and Italian tomato soup can product, then simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
